changes: v3.91 + v11.22: Sustainability Profile — per-sport power/HR sustainability table for race performance estimation. Coggan duration factors + CP/W' model with divergence as coaching signal. Indoor/outdoor source flag.
v3.87 + v11.19: Power Curve Delta — MMP comparison at 5 anchor durations across two 28-day windows. Rotation index (sprint vs endurance bias).
v3.88 + v11.20: HR Curve Delta — max sustained HR at 4 anchors across two 28-day windows. Cross-sport (no sport filter). Rising HR flagged as ambiguous (fitness vs fatigue).
v3.89: Phase detection fix — current-week data was reading stale history.json (up to 28d old). Runtime overlay + phase duration counter + previous_phase bug fixes.
v3.90 + v11.21: Sleep signal simplified — hours only (≥7h/5–7h/<5h). Quality/score removed from readiness (double-counted HRV/HR). Still flows as coaching context.
v3.92: --update auto-clears history.json + intervals.json when sync.py changes. Prevents stale-schema bugs.
v11.18: Environmental Conditions Protocol — delta-based heat stress tiers relative to 14-day thermal baseline. Cold weather protocol. Indoor heat recognized. Evidence-based (8 citations).
README: Agentic-first reorder. Platform guides rewritten.
Upgrade: replace your sync.py with the latest from github.com/CrankAddict/section-11/tree/main/examples/sync.py
